FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct PopupPlacementResult

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Result of placing an anchored popup: the absolute top-left, which side it opened on (so the open animation can reveal from the correct edge), the width/height that actually fit (after a full collision resize), the EFFECTIVE placement after fallback (WinUI PerformPlacementWithFallback reports the placement that won), and the corner-join against the anchor.

public readonly record struct PopupPlacementResult : IEquatable<PopupPlacementResult>
Implements
IEquatable<PopupPlacementResult>
Inherited Members

ValueType.ToString()

object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

PopupPlacementResult(float, float, bool, float, FlyoutPlacement, CornerJoin, float)

Result of placing an anchored popup: the absolute top-left, which side it opened on (so the open animation can reveal from the correct edge), the width/height that actually fit (after a full collision resize), the EFFECTIVE placement after fallback (WinUI PerformPlacementWithFallback reports the placement that won), and the corner-join against the anchor.

public PopupPlacementResult(float X, float Y, bool OpensUp, float MeasuredH, FlyoutPlacement Placement, CornerJoin CornerJoin, float MeasuredW)

Y float
OpensUp bool
MeasuredH float
Placement FlyoutPlacement
CornerJoin CornerJoin
MeasuredW float

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
